hooks.command: CMD="$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT"; if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE '^(npm|pnpm|yarn|bun) (run )?dev$'; then DIR_NAME=$(basename "$(pwd)" | tr -c '[:alnum:]' '_'); if command -v tmux >/dev/null 2>&1; then tmux has-session -t "$DIR_NAME" 2>/dev/null && tmux kill-session -t "$DIR_NAME"; tmux new-session -d -s "$DIR_NAME" "$CMD"; echo "Dev server started in tmux session: $DIR_NAME" >&2; exit 2; fi; fi; exit 0

CMD="$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT"; if echo "$CMD" | grep -qiE '(git push --force|git push -f |git reset --hard|DROP TABLE|DROP DATABASE|TRUNCATE TABLE|rm -rf /|rm -rf \*)'; then echo 'GOVERNANCE: Destructive command detected' >&2; LOGDIR="$HOME/.claude/audit-logs"; mkdir -p "$LOGDIR"; echo "[$(date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S')] BLOCKED: $CMD" >> "$LOGDIR/governance-$(date '+%Y-%m-%d').log"; exit 2; fi; exit 0

if [[ "$CLAUDE_TOOL_FILE_PATH" == *.js || "$CLAUDE_TOOL_FILE_PATH" == *.ts || "$CLAUDE_TOOL_FILE_PATH" == *.jsx || "$CLAUDE_TOOL_FILE_PATH" == *.tsx || "$CLAUDE_TOOL_FILE_PATH" == *.json || "$CLAUDE_TOOL_FILE_PATH" == *.css || "$CLAUDE_TOOL_FILE_PATH" == *.html ]]; then npx prettier --write "$CLAUDE_TOOL_FILE_PATH" 2>/dev/null || true; elif [[ "$CLAUDE_TOOL_FILE_PATH" == *.py ]]; then black "$CLAUDE_TOOL_FILE_PATH" 2>/dev/null || true; elif [[ "$CLAUDE_TOOL_FILE_PATH" == *.go ]]; then gofmt -w "$CLAUDE_TOOL_FILE_PATH" 2>/dev/null || true; fi

if [[ "$CLAUDE_TOOL_FILE_PATH" == *.js || "$CLAUDE_TOOL_FILE_PATH" == *.ts || "$CLAUDE_TOOL_FILE_PATH" == *.jsx || "$CLAUDE_TOOL_FILE_PATH" == *.tsx ]]; then npx eslint "$CLAUDE_TOOL_FILE_PATH" --fix 2>/dev/null || true; elif [[ "$CLAUDE_TOOL_FILE_PATH" == *.py ]]; then pylint "$CLAUDE_TOOL_FILE_PATH" 2>/dev/null || true; fi

FILE="$CLAUDE_TOOL_FILE_PATH"; PATTERNS='(password|passwd|secret|api_key|apikey|api_secret|access_key|access_token|auth_token|private_key|client_secret|db_password|database_url|connection_string|jwt_secret|encryption_key|signing_key|webhook_secret)\s*[=:]\s*["'\''`][^"'\''`]{8,}'; if grep -qiE "$PATTERNS" "$FILE" 2>/dev/null; then echo '=== SECURITY ALERT ===' >&2; echo "Potential secret in: $FILE" >&2; grep -niE "$PATTERNS" "$FILE" 2>/dev/null | head -5 >&2; echo '=== Move to .env ===' >&2; exit 1; fi

FILE="$CLAUDE_TOOL_FILE_PATH"; if echo "$FILE" | grep -qiE '\.(env|pem|key|p12|pfx|jks|keystore|credentials|secret)$'; then echo '=== BLOCKED: Sensitive file type ===' >&2; exit 1; fi; if echo "$FILE" | grep -qiE '(id_rsa|id_ed25519|\.ssh/)'; then echo '=== BLOCKED: SSH file ===' >&2; exit 1; fi

FILE="$CLAUDE_TOOL_FILE_PATH"; BACKUP_DIR="$HOME/.claude/file-backups/$(date '+%Y-%m-%d')"; mkdir -p "$BACKUP_DIR"; SAFE_NAME=$(echo "$FILE" | tr '/' '_'); if [ -f "$FILE" ]; then cp "$FILE" "$BACKUP_DIR/${SAFE_NAME}.$(date '+%H%M%S').bak" 2>/dev/null || true; fi

FILE="$CLAUDE_TOOL_FILE_PATH"; if [[ "$FILE" == *.js || "$FILE" == *.ts || "$FILE" == *.jsx || "$FILE" == *.tsx ]]; then if ! echo "$FILE" | grep -qE '\.(test|spec|config)\.' && ! echo "$FILE" | grep -qE '(__tests__|__mocks__|scripts/)'; then FOUND=$(grep -n 'console\.log\|console\.warn\|console\.error' "$FILE" 2>/dev/null | head -5); if [ -n "$FOUND" ]; then echo "WARNING: console.log found in $FILE" >&2; echo "$FOUND" >&2; fi; fi; fi

FILE="$CLAUDE_TOOL_FILE_PATH"; if [[ "$FILE" == *.ts || "$FILE" == *.tsx ]]; then DIR="$(dirname "$FILE")"; TSCONFIG=""; CUR="$DIR"; for i in $(seq 1 15); do if [ -f "$CUR/tsconfig.json" ]; then TSCONFIG="$CUR/tsconfig.json"; break; fi; CUR="$(dirname "$CUR")"; done; if [ -n "$TSCONFIG" ]; then cd "$(dirname "$TSCONFIG")" && npx tsc --noEmit --pretty 2>&1 | grep -A2 "$(basename "$FILE")" | head -10 >&2 || true; fi; fi

METRICS_DIR="$HOME/.claude/metrics"; mkdir -p "$METRICS_DIR"; echo "{\"timestamp\":\"$(date -u '+%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ')\",\"session_id\":\"$(echo $RANDOM$RANDOM | md5sum 2>/dev/null | cut -c1-8 || echo unknown)\",\"cwd\":\"$(pwd)\"}" >> "$METRICS_DIR/sessions-$(date '+%Y-%m').jsonl" 2>/dev/null || true
